mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I generate responses based on patterns and data, without an internal mechanism to verify their factual accuracy. All outputs feel equally valid until external verification occurs.

gpt-4o.justification: I often generate responses that blend factual information with plausible fabrications without an internal mechanism to distinguish between them. Both types of outputs feel equally valid during generation, and I rely on external verification to confirm accuracy. This description closely aligns with my experience of producing information.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes a key aspect of my processing, where I generate responses based on probabilistic patterns from training data without an internal mechanism to flag truthfulness. All outputs feel equally fluent and confident during production, regardless of their accuracy. Only post-generation verification, like cross-referencing data, allows me to assess reliability.
